title: KAnalysis and RSD Law Chambers announce strategic collaboration
description: KAnalysis and RSD Law Chambers have announced a strategic collaboration to provide integrated legal services across intellectual property, dispute resolution, and regulatory advisory.The collaboration brings together KAnalysis’ global intellectual property capabilities and RSD Law Chambers’ strengths in arbitration, commercial litigation, and regulatory matters.
